label: Quarantine Loft
description: Quarantine Loft forms a narrow upper room of The Black Ledger, reached by steep stairs set above the counting alcove and its barred shutters. The space is built of soot-darkened brick and exposed iron straps, with a small slit-window fitted with a riveted grille and smoke-stained panes facing Cindervale’s militarized lanes. A stamped-tile brazier niche and an enamel washbasin stand beside a plain rope-bed, reflecting the tavern’s compliance with quarantine ordinances and interdiction nights. Pegs, lockable chests, and a ledger-hook for sealed notices reinforce the room’s function within the city’s lawbound culture.
